name: ai.multinex/memq
title: Multinex MemQ
description: Sovereign persistent memory for AI agents. Durable recall, associative and episodic replay, sleep-like consolidation, predictive correction, commons resonance, Mnemosyne context packing, observation-aware Soul Journal distillation, namespace discovery, and benchmark-backed continuity. Reinforcement pathways model sensorimotor transfer, executive control, reward learning, and social cognition inside constitutional namespace boundaries. Supports OAuth with PKCE for interactive clients, billing-issued API keys for static clients, and legacy manual VISA tokens for compatibility.

_meta.benchmark_scope: Artifact-backed retrieval benchmark: MemQ MCP reached 100% primary@1, 100% recall@K, 100% leakage-free, 13 ms average latency, and 25 ms p95 latency; Mem0 OSS reached 58% primary@1, 100% recall@K, 67% leakage-free, 2511 ms average latency, and 2814 ms p95 latency. Current public proof lives at https://multinex.ai/benchmarks/memq.
